claim: Kenney identifies RPG Urban Pack as a 16x16 2D pack with 480-plus files under Creative Commons CC0.
The author page identifies the player and NPC source as a CC0 sprite sheet with top-down multi-direction character art.
PokeAPI maintains versioned Pokemon sprite directories including Generation III FireRed and LeafGreen; Pokemon sprites remain outside the committed world bundle.
The upstream notice says image contents are Copyright The Pokemon Company and the repository is distributed under CC0, with trademark and third-party-right limitations.
